School.title: School Tenant Entity
School.description: Represents a single school registered on the multi-tenant School ERP.

city.description: City where the school is located

state.description: State where the school is located

activeFeatures.description: Flags setting enabled/disabled modules per school

Student.title: Student Entity
Student.description: Represents a student enrolled in a specific class and school.

schoolId.description: Foreign key partition identifier to ensure strict multi-tenant isolation

Teacher.title: Teacher Entity
Teacher.description: Represents an instructor or teacher employed by a school.

Notice.title: Notice/Circular Entity
Notice.description: Represents general memos, alerts, and instructions sent by school admins to parents.

/schools/{schoolId}.description: Document root representing each school's general statistics and basic configurations.

/schools/{schoolId}/students/{studentId}.description: Sub-collection of students segmented strictly inside each school path.

/schools/{schoolId}/teachers/{teacherId}.description: Sub-collection of teachers partitioned by schoolId.
